hyperedges.label: End-to-End AI Search Retrieval Pipeline
hyperedges.source_file: ficfinder-vault/Timeline/Apr 2 - Bedrock Live and HyDE Pipeline.md

hyperedges.label: Search query pipeline (enhance → embed → RRF → rank)
Leaked-secrets remediation (env vars, git history, webhook secret)
LLM prompt-injection surface (enhancer, ranker, scraped fic content)
Denial-of-wallet chain (disabled gate, unbounded query, no timeouts)
Google OAuth -> JWT -> DynamoDB User Lookup Auth Flow
Stripe Checkout -> Webhook -> Tier Update Billing Flow
Query Enhance -> Embed -> Retrieve -> Rank Search Pipeline
AO3 / FFN / Wattpad scrapers share build-url → fetch → parse_results → Fic shape
AI search pipeline: HyDE enhance → multi-source scrape → LLM rank
Frontend search request flow: HomePage → useSearch → /api/search SSE proxy → backend /search

hyperedges.label: Search query pipeline (enhance → embed → RRF → rank)
